title: Ancient wisdom, modern bottles: The rise of Ayurveda in global bridal beauty routines
description: Between turmeric-infused face serums, rosewater tonics and the revival of rituals like hair oiling, Ayurvedic ingredients and philosophies are reshaping modern beauty.

title: Rome`s Colosseum restored using the same travertine marble of ancient Rome
description: The structure, which still captures the public`s imagination, is Italy`s most popular tourist destination, with nine million visitors in 2025 alone

title: Mosaic says ‘haters gonna hate’ in ancient city
description: Archaeologists in the ancient city of Syedra in southern Türkiye have uncovered a 1,500-year-old mosaic bearing an inscription similar to the modern expression ‘let the jealous burst’

title: Jar burials: a glimpse into ancient China’s compassion, funeral practices for infant deaths
description: One of the profound tragedies in life is the burial of the youngest among us. In Neolithic China (9,000–1,500 BC), urn burials were often designated for the deceased children and infants. While urn burials for older babies have been extensively studied, there remains little understanding of burial customs surrounding stillbirths, miscarriages, or newborns who passed shortly after birth. A new 2026 study in China revealed that by examining 16 urn burials associated with perinatal deaths from over...

title: Letter to the editor: Good luck getting a law about fossil fuel emissions passed now
description: The endangerment finding has finally been rescinded. It was created using illegal methods, subterfuge and unscientific support for political and economic gain.
